fs.notes: The shared sync fs bridge is cataloged here to document overlap with future WinterTC-style profiles, but no WinterTC fs surface is claimed yet.

crypto.notes: The current WinterTC crypto profile covers randomUUID, getRandomValues, stable subtle object identity, Promise-backed subtle.digest over the SHA digest family, Promise-backed HMAC generateKey/importKey/exportKey/sign/verify over raw and jwk key formats, and Promise-backed AES-GCM generateKey/importKey/exportKey/encrypt/decrypt over raw and jwk key formats. Other subtle algorithms remain pending.
